acceptance_tests_summary: Deterministic precheck passes with no deliverable_mismatches for calculation_log.txt.
Verifier reports no internal consistency issues and acknowledges documented scoring formula.
All artifacts referenced in final_message and actual_outputs.metadata_json are present and correctly named.
extra_model_fields.notes: Primary low-effort changes: copy MD to TXT, update manifest, and canonicalize grader output fields and metadata. The grader-code change is slightly higher risk because it touches output serialization, so verify with unit tests.

planned_changes.acceptance_test: Deterministic precheck returns artifact_contract_passed = true (no deliverable_mismatches for calculation_log.txt).
planned_changes.description: Create calculation_log.txt (plain text) that is a verbatim copy of imaging_QC_calculation_log.md content. Place it in attempts/baseline/artifacts/ as calculation_log.txt and include it in produced_deliverable_items and supporting_artifacts references.

planned_changes.acceptance_test: final_message and actual_outputs.metadata_json.supporting_artifacts list calculation_log.txt (or both files) and produced_deliverable_items includes calculation_log.txt.
planned_changes.description: Update final_message.txt and actual_outputs metadata to reference calculation_log.txt instead of the .md filename (or include both with clear manifest mapping).

planned_changes.acceptance_test: Verifier run returns no 'internal_pass_flag_consistency' or 'internal_score_consistency' failed checks.
planned_changes.description: Modify grader output generation so only a single canonical set of evaluation fields is emitted at the top-level: 'passed' (boolean), 'score' (float), 'artifact_contract_score' (float), 'semantic_score' (float), and 'final_score' (float). Remove or synchronize duplicate/conflicting fields in raw_model_output/raw_llm_output.

planned_changes.acceptance_test: Verifier check that scoring mapping exists and final_score can be recomputed from documented components matches reported final_score within rounding tolerance.
planned_changes.description: Add explicit scoring formula and weights in grader_result.metadata_json (e.g., final_score = w1*semantic_score + w2*artifact_contract_score with numeric w1,w2) and include a short rationale.

planned_changes.acceptance_test: pre_submit_checks.sh exits with code 0 and prints success messages.
planned_changes.description: Add a pre-submission script to run deterministic artifact-contract precheck and the grader/verifier consistency checks locally. Fail fast if deliverable filenames or graded-field consistency issues remain.

planned_changes.acceptance_test: Grader metadata lists accepted calculation log filenames and formats; deterministic precheck respects policy.
planned_changes.description: If desired, update deliverable policy (grader metadata) to explicitly accept .md as an allowed calculation_log format and list acceptable filenames. Alternatively, document why .txt/.json are required.

raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Fix deliverable filename/format mismatch and remove grader/verifier internal inconsistencies; document scoring mapping so final_score derivation is transparent.

raw_model_output.revision_reason: Fix deliverable filename/format mismatch and remove grader/verifier internal inconsistencies; document scoring mapping so final_score derivation is transparent.

metadata_json.revision_goal: The baseline correctly applied the four QC rules and provided a traceable CSV with per-subject intermediate calculations. However: (1) the deterministic artifact-contract precheck flagged a deliverable filename/format mismatch (calculation_log.md present but calculation_log.txt expected), which reduced the artifact_contract_score; (2) the grader/verifier outputs contain internal inconsistencies (conflicting 'passed' flags and duplicated/conflicting score fields across top-level and raw_model_output/raw_llm_output), and (3) the numeric mapping from artifact_contract penalties to the final_score is undocumented. Resolve the filename/format issue and fix grader output consistency and scoring documentation before resubmission.
